query:
UPDATE broadcast_delivery_queue 
                SET retry_count = retry_count + 1,
                    status = CASE 
                        WHEN retry_count + 1 >= max_retries THEN 'failed'
                        ELSE 'pending'
                    END,
                    error_message = $2,
                    last_error_at = NOW(),
                    next_retry_at = NOW() + INTERVAL '5 minutes',
                    updated_at = NOW()
                WHERE id = $1
